title: Drive Buy
short_description: A fast-paced multiplayer car combat game where you race to sell the most products to hypnotised customers.
description: Drive Buy is a fast-paced multiplayer vehicle combat game developed by Glitchers. Players race through chaotic urban environments competing to sell the most products to customers brainwashed by hypnotic screens. Outrun rivals, use power-ups to destroy them, and steal their credits to come out on top. The game supports online and local multiplayer and is available on Steam and Nintendo Switch.
